[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000011100 3
1 1010011111 7
2 0001001010 3
3 0011001101 5
4 1011000000 3
5 0010001001 3
6 1101100000 4
7 0100100110 4

01 10 1001000010 3
12 21 0010001000 2
23 32 0000000000 a
34 43 0100100000 2
45 54 0000000100 1
56 65 0000011000 2
67 76 0000001010 2
70 07 0001000110 3

02 20 0000000000 a
13 31 1001000000 2
24 42 0000000000 a
35 53 0000000000 a
46 64 0000100010 2
57 75 0000001100 2
60 06 1000000010 2
71 17 0001001010 3 match 2

03 30 1001000000 2
14 41 0000000010 1
25 52 0000001000 1
36 63 1000100000 2
47 74 0000000110 2
50 05 0000000100 1
61 16 1010001010 4
72 27 0000001000 1

04 40 0000000110 2
15 51 0000001000 1
26 62 0010001001 3 match 5
37 73 0001000000 1
[completion]
